<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The current levels in the JSON file will be rewritten with a wider spread.

Level 1 will be a concrete image for ages 7–8 (~20 words). Level 2 will be a grade 6 analogy. Level 3 will be a grade 10 cause-effect. Level 4 will be adult actionable. Level 5 will be expert nuance with wikilinks. Bullet 1 and bullets 7+ remain unchanged. Each level gets a `Level N:` prefix. Contractions are forbidden. Key_concept must have no blank lines.

A Python script will handle all 43 notes. New Level 1–5 text must be written first. Then the markdown files will be rebuilt from bullet 1, the rewritten levels, and the remaining bullets.

I am reading the 43 note files to check for bible shortcodes and other structural differences. The plan is to build an updated JSON with the new wider-spread levels, then run a Python script to patch all markdown files.
